description_long: This upright piano features a classic wooden exterior with a natural grain finish, giving it a warm and traditional appearance. The front panel is adorned with decorative rectangular insets and a closed lid that conceals the upper mechanism. The keyboard is fully exposed, displaying a standard arrangement of white and black keys, while three pedals are visible at the base. The sides are solid wood, and the back panel is reinforced with diagonal wooden braces over a dark backing, providing structural support. The piano stands on four sturdy legs, and the overall craftsmanship suggests durability and elegance. No visible brand or logo is present, and there is no music stand attached.
description: A classic upright piano with a natural wood finish, exposed keyboard, and three pedals, featuring decorative front panels and a reinforced back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the decorative wooden panel, exposed keyboard, and three pedals at the base.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the solid wood side panel and the depth of the piano.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing diagonal wooden braces over a dark backing, highlighting the piano's structural support.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the solid wood panel and the piano's overall thickness.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard layout with alternating white and black keys, approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys, no visible missing or non-standard keys.
